features.title: Billing Features
features.subtitle: Financial Management
features.description: Comprehensive billing and payment processing tools designed to streamline your practice's financial operations.

items.title: Automated Invoicing
items.description: Generate invoices automatically based on treatments, with customizable templates and automatic payment reminders.

items.title: Insurance Claims
items.description: Streamlined insurance claim submission with real-time eligibility verification and automated follow-ups.

items.title: Payment Processing
items.description: Accept payments online and in-person with multiple payment methods and secure processing.

items.title: Financial Reporting
items.description: Comprehensive financial reports and analytics to track revenue, collections, and practice performance.

showcase.description: See how practices are streamlining their billing operations

testimonials.author: Emily Rodriguez
testimonials.quote: Billing automation has reduced our administrative time by 50%. We process claims faster and collect payments more efficiently.

items.title: Faster Processing
items.description: Automated workflows process invoices and claims much faster than manual methods.

items.title: Save Time

items.title: Improve Collections
